formulas.label: e0050
formulas.latex: n_{\mathit{rkf}} = \left\{\begin{matrix} n_{r , k - 1 , f} . \left(1 - \varphi_{\mathit{kf}}^{\left(t\right)}\right) + b_{\mathit{rkf}} & 2 \leq k \leq m - 1 , t = \mathit{dep}_{\mathit{rkf}} \\ b_{\mathit{rkf}} & k = 1 \end{matrix}\right

                                       </mml:mrow>
                                    </mml:mfrac>
                                 </mml:math>
